title: Project Ores+
description: A project i am working on that has a purpose of making a use of unused ores and making new, independent cool ores.
body:
A project i am working on that has a purpose of making a use of unused ores and making new, independent cool ores. Currently brings life to the lapis lazuli, Emerald, Amethyst and brings even more use to the other already used ores by Mojang. Some of the textures are not made by me, so the mod is currently in alpha and unfinished. There is a lapis world where you make a nether shaped portal and ignite it with a special igniter. There are paxels and multitools for the people that need a all-in-one tool. Then there are tools and armor for all these ores:Lapis, Emerald and Amethyst. There are other new ores too and those are: Purple diamond (same power of diamond as expected), Steel(iron with coal) and the SUPER ore and this ore is a really rare ore that is really op so if someone wants to max out late game, they get the super ore. There are also apples that give you special powers as to what they are made of. For example, a copper apple gives you speed and haste. These features are to make a all-in-one-useful mod.

 

(i allow using it in servers and aternos but dont put it on other sites)
